join_order.method: direct_array_lookup: flat_array[25] indexed by n_nationkey → uint8_t nation_code; then flat_array[100001] indexed by s_suppkey → uint8_t nation_code

join_order.build: part (2M rows, filtered by p_name LIKE '%green%' → ~96K qualifying partkeys)
join_order.probe_structure: bitset(2_000_001 bits = ~250KB, indexed by p_partkey); O(1) probe, fully L3-resident

join_order.build: partsupp (8M rows, filtered by ps_partkey IN part_bitset → ~384K entries)
join_order.probe_structure: compact_hash_map: key=uint64((uint32_t)ps_partkey<<32|(uint32_t)ps_suppkey), value=float32 ps_supplycost; pre-sized 384K, open-addressing robin_hood
compact_hash_map: key=int32 o_orderkey, value=uint8 year_offset=(1998 - YEAR_TABLE[o_orderdate]); pre-sized 15M entries; partitioned parallel build

join_order.probe: lineitem (60M rows, pre-filtered by l_partkey bitset probe → ~2.88M passing rows)

data_structures.nation_lookup: flat_array[25] uint8_t indexed by n_nationkey → nation_code; fully in L1 cache
data_structures.supplier_nation_map: flat_array[100001] uint8_t indexed by s_suppkey → nation_code; ~100KB, fits in L2 cache; built sequentially
data_structures.part_filter: bitset(2_000_001 bits = 250KB) indexed by p_partkey; set bit for each qualifying partkey; 250KB fits in L3; O(1) test-and-branch per lineitem row
data_structures.partsupp_join: compact_hash_map pre_sized(384K entries, load_factor=0.7); key=uint64_t((uint32_t)ps_partkey<<32|(uint32_t)ps_suppkey); value=float ps_supplycost; robin_hood open_addressing; ~12MB resident
data_structures.orders_join: compact_hash_map pre_sized(15M entries, load_factor=0.7); key=int32_t o_orderkey; value=uint8_t year_offset=(1998 - extract_year(o_orderdate)); ~150MB resident; partitioned parallel build (64 partitions)
data_structures.aggregation: thread_local double[25][7] flat array per thread (profit[nation_code][year_offset]); 175 entries × 8 bytes = 1400 bytes per thread, fits in L1; merge after parallel phase

phases.note: 2M rows; parallel LIKE '%green%' scan with thread-local bitsets, bitwise-OR merge at end; or atomic bitset with fetch_or
100K rows only; trivial single-pass build of flat_array[s_suppkey]→nation_code using pre-built nation array
8M rows; filter by part_bitset (probe ps_partkey), parallel insert into partitioned hash map (64 partitions by key hash); no contention across partitions
15M rows; date extraction via YEAR_TABLE[o_orderdate] (O(1)); parallel insert into 64-partition hash map; each thread owns its partitions
60M rows, 6 columns loaded per row; dominant phase; each thread processes 65536-row morsels; thread-local double[25][7] aggregation avoids all synchronization in hot loop
merge 64 × 175 double values (trivial); sort 175 output rows by (nation_name ASC, year_offset ASC equiv to o_year DESC)

parallelism.synchronization: thread_local_merge for aggregation (zero contention in hot loop); partitioned_no_contention for hash table builds (64 independent partitions)

physical_plan.memory_pattern: streaming_sequential for all column scans; random_access_with_prefetch for hash table probes in lineitem hot loop

key_implementation_notes.date_extraction: use gendb::init_date_tables() + gendb::extract_year(epoch_day) via date_utils.h; O(1) per row via YEAR_TABLE[epoch_day]; 7 distinct years (1992-1998) → year_offset = 1998 - year (0..6)
key_implementation_notes.composite_key: uint64_t key = ((uint64_t)(uint32_t)ps_partkey << 32) | (uint32_t)ps_suppkey; same encoding for partsupp build and lineitem probe
key_implementation_notes.part_name_access: offsets_data encoding: char* s = p_name_data + p_name_offsets[i]; len = p_name_offsets[i+1] - p_name_offsets[i]; std::string_view(s,len).find('green') != npos
key_implementation_notes.agg_indexing: profit[nation_code][year_offset] where nation_code = supplier_nation_array[l_suppkey], year_offset = orders_hashmap[l_orderkey]
key_implementation_notes.output_sort: sort 175 pairs (nation_name_string, o_year) by nation ASC then o_year DESC; use std::sort on tiny array

estimated_cost.bottleneck: orders hash map build (15M entries) and lineitem 6-column scan overlap in pipeline; HDD sequential I/O amortized by mmap prefetch and 64-thread parallelism
